вҶ№: ibha lomcibisholo ngakwesokudla ngaphezu kwebha lomcibisholo wangakwesokudla

вӢӯ: does not contain as normal subgroup equal
в–§: square upper left lower right fill
в–Ё: square upper right lower left fill
в—•: circle all but upper left quadrant filled
в—·: hollow circle with upper right quadrant
